hero.subtitle: A Toronto-based studio focused on fast, maintainable websites for small businesses — technical precision without the jargon.

heroImage.alt: Abstract tech visualization — modern web development

servicesTeaser.title: Core capabilities
servicesTeaser.subtitle: Engineered for performance, designed for people who run real businesses.

pricingTeaser.title: Website pricing
pricingTeaser.subtitle: Two packages: $1,600 upfront plus $20/mo for essentials, or $0 upfront and $150/mo for full optimization, reporting, and unlimited edits.

contactTeaser.headline: Ready to talk?
contactTeaser.body: Tell me what you need — I’ll reply with a clear next step and honest scope. Currently taking new small-business projects in Toronto and remote.
contactTeaser.responseNote: I usually reply within one business day
